prompt: I need a design doc for adding a Dialogue System. Requirements: branching conversations with conditions, localization support, integration with our EventBus for triggering game events from dialogue choices. We have no dialogue system currently.
assertions: Output is saved to Documents/TDDs/ with TDD_ prefix
Document has Problem, Goals, Non-Goals clearly separated
Design section proposes concrete components with responsibilities
Design includes a Mermaid diagram showing data flow
Alternatives section compares at least 2 approaches with pros/cons
No TODO/TBD/FIXME placeholders in the output
